creator: des@des.no
text:
Florent Thoumie <flz@xbsd.org> writes:
> Dag-Erling, you said you wasn't able to reproduce problem 3
> means that it actually works ?

Not really; it just means I haven't managed to make doscmd SIGBUS.
However, due to the other bugs I mentioned, I haven't been able to
test doscmd very thoroughly.

Looking at the patch now, I'm a little unsure about the correctness of
the last hunk, but it's been a while since I wrote it, so I don't
remember precisely why I chose to use getdtablesize() there.

DES
